title: Visual Art
description: Physical works, images, material experiments, and visual narratives.
intro: This keeps the original direction of the work display, but shifts it from a single-page placeholder draft into an archive structure better suited for long-term expansion. The materials can be replaced gradually; for now, the page first holds the framework.

works.title: Fragmentation and Reconstruction
works.summary: An exploration of self-reconstruction after trauma, a dialogue between ceramic and metal.
works.quote: True resilience is not never being shattered, but having the courage to piece the fragments into a new form.

works.title: Asynchronous Dialogue
works.summary: Using algorithmically generated soundscapes to simulate the aesthetics of non-real-time communication.
works.quote: A delayed reply is not the fading of feeling, but the settling of thought.

reserved.title: Reserved for new visual works
reserved.text: Physical works, photography, stills from video, material experiments, or fuller project notes can be added here later.
